_comment: Recorded 2026-04-23 over 200 'extract a Person from this paragraph' prompts using claude-haiku-4-5 (fast, cheap, but loose enough on JSON to make the comparison interesting). Four strategies share the same prompts and the same model; only schema enforcement differs. compliance is the fraction of outputs that successfully parse into the Person schema. mean_calls is total LLM calls per successful output (>1 when retries fire).

tool_use.comment: Schema travels as a tool definition; cost includes the extra ~30 tokens of schema in every request

instructor.comment: instructor.from_anthropic(client).messages.create(response_model=Person, max_retries=2). Backed by tool_use under the hood + automatic retry on Pydantic ValidationError.
